context: You love playing games, you are curious about the game and want to try your luck. You love to win!

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to C, E, and H during our pre-game chats. With C, we bonded over shared excitement for building alliances and strategies, which made our conversation feel genuine and aligned with my own goals. E and I connected deeply through discussing family motivations and ways to stay calm under pressure, while H and I quickly agreed on the importance of open communication and teamwork, making me feel like we were on the same team from the start. On the other hand, I felt least connected to B, as our discussions were more surface-level, focusing on general advice without much depth or mutual sharing of personal strategies.

I did make agreements with a few people, like teaming up with C and D to work together in the game, and expressing a desire to collaborate with H for better outcomes. Going into the game, I trust C, E, and H based on our open and honest conversations, but I don't specifically distrust anyone yet since most interactions were positive overall.
